content:
# Repository Overview

This repository is organized into three primary modules: Core, API, and Utils.

```mermaid
graph TD
  Core --> API
  Core --> Utils
  API --> Utils
```

## Module Summary

- Core coordinates configuration and analysis.
- API wraps external integrations.
- Utils provides shared types and helpers.
mermaidDiagram:
graph TD
  Core --> API
  Core --> Utils
  API --> Utils
